name: 一维运动
subject: physics
curriculum_points:
1.2.A.2
Displacement is the change in an object’s position.

1.2.B.2
Average velocity is the displacement of an object divided by the interval of time in which that displacement occurs.

1.2.B.3
Average acceleration is the change in velocity divided by the interval of time in which that change in velocity occurs.

1.3.A.2
For constant acceleration, three kinematic equations can be used to describe instantaneous linear motion in one dimension:
v =v +a t
x x0 x
1 2
x =x +v t+ a t
0 x0 2 x
v2 =v2 +2 a( −xx )
x x0 x 0
Note: The equations above are written to indicate motion in the x-direction, but these equations can be used in any single dimension as appropriate.

interactive_resources.description: GeoGebra 物理公式可视化：调节参数观察物理量关系

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「一维运动」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer:
应答扣课标要点：1.2.A.2
Displacement is the change in an object’s position.…；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem:
用因果链解释：1.2.B.2
Average velocity is the displacement of an object divided by the interva… 对理解「一维运动」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
